description: Baseline measurement of mixed workload throughput
Use FxHasher in DashMap for faster hash lookups

asi.hypothesis: The default SipHash is slower; switching to FxHash will reduce hash computation overhead
asi.change_summary: Changed DashMap to use FxBuildHasher (BuildHasherDefault<FxHasher>) instead of default RandomState/SipHash
files_modified: src/lib.rs: StorageEngine::data field type and new() initialization

description: Use atomic current_len to avoid O(num_shards) len() in set hot path

asi.hypothesis: Calling DashMap::len() in set is expensive because it sums over shards; maintain a separate atomic counter for current length to make high_water_mark update cheap
changes: Increment on Vacant in set, decrement in remove
Update flush and compact to use current_len
Use atomic load for high_water_mark update
files_modified: src/lib.rs: StorageEngine struct, new(), set(), remove(), flush(), maybe_compact(), compact()
